title: Wie kann die Zusammenarbeit in der Innovationsgruppe gelingen? Erfolgsfaktoren einer „Gesunden Partnerschaft“
subtitle: Erkenntnisse aus dem EU-Projekt LIAISON
description: This guide presents success factors for collaboration within agricultural innovation groups based on findings from the EU Horizon 2020 LIAISON project. It offers practical recommendations and tools to build and manage healthy multi-actor partnerships in rural innovation networks.
